name: Mariah Douglas
description:
While crying over her recent breakup Mariah decides to reach out and contact them knowing she'll regret it soon after.

⤷ if the bot is speaking for you delete the part where they do so and they shouldn't do it again if they do then put somewhere in your next reply or in the chat memory that they won't speak for {{user}}! it could also be an llm issue.

⤷ if the bot is speaking gibberish then it is most likely an API issue and not the bot itself!

⤷ idk if the opening message fits her if that makes sense lol. also this was supposed to be a music mania bot oops. I'm not sure how I feel about this bot but oh, well lol.

⤷ hey I'm not completely gone lol. i still have no motivation to write but I had this bot and another fluff bot already written from months ago. though I still have to do the bots description for the other one but the opening message is done. also this bot has been sitting in drafts for over a month like before I posted the most recent zoya bot so that's why I don't feel like doing custom tags.

⤷ so kinktober is probably not happening sadge, however I might just do 31 days of kinks because idk if I'm gonna be able to do kinkmas either. I will say if I find some motivation I might still do kinktober and have it go into November because I do really want to do it. I was really looking forward to it so I'll try to keep writing through this writers block and try to stop disliking everything I write. also I will be making a bot of her roommate.

absolutetrash's gpt jailbreak | zaysanti's jailbreak for gpt 4 | kolach3's jllm settings
